> ⚠️ **Do not paste real LinkedIn profile data, screenshots of your profile, emails, or phone numbers into this issue.** This is a public tracker. Anonymize everything.

(e.g. "running Phase 6, pushing my new headline")

(describe the behavior — keep any error text, but redact personal data)
